metadata.source: CDC 2025 Lone Star Tick Surveillance (via https://www.cdc.gov/ticks/data-research/facts-stats/lone-star-tick-surveillance.html) + Springer et al. 2014 historical + additional sources from additional_sources.json (Eisen 2016, CDC Tick Surveillance 2025)
metadata.notes: Updated with 2025 surveillance data for expanded coverage in Midwest and Northeast. Additional states added for blob expansion based on latest CDC maps. See data/additional_sources.json for full recommended sources.
